high_priority_findings.finding: META_LEARNING_IDEAS_INVERSION_BUG (NEW): 4/8 proposed ideas have directionally inverted logic — they recommend 1.08x confidence boost for sessions with 33% WR. Root cause: idea generator may apply fixed 'boost' template without checking whether WR is above/below 50% breakeven.
